pageText.title: Trouble
pageText.subTitle: Daily inventory tools for those troubled with compulsive urges.
collapsedText: When you literally cannot control yourself, you need the help of a power greater than yourself.
This is An AA Style Step 10.

questions: Did I avoid anger & resentment today?
Was I honest in every situation & with everyone today?
Did I stay out of selfishness & self-centeredness today?
Do I need to make amends for any hurts I may have caused today?
Did I stay out of self-pity today? Did I remember that others suffer, too?
Did I try to be kind and loving with everyone today?
If my feelings were hurt today, was I able to forgive?
Did I stay close to my HP., asking to do HP.s will today?
Did I reach out to another sufferer today?
Did I go to a meeting today? If so did I share at group level or talk to another member?
Did I read program literature today?
Did I get humble today? Was I able to pray or ask for help?
